_comment: Representative fixture matching Withings' publicly documented v2/measure Getmeas response shape (spec FOR-132 tests.md: 'never call the live Withings API in tests'). One real-measure group (category=1) carrying weight (type 1), fat ratio % (type 6), muscle mass (type 76) and hydration mass (type 77). value*10^unit: weight 72500*10^-3=72.5kg, fat% 18200*10^-3=18.2%, muscle 32000*10^-3=32.0kg, hydration 43500*10^-3=43.5kg -> waterPercentage = 43.5/72.5*100 = 60.0%.
